steps.title: Name the audio-feature problem
steps.content: The student needs to explain a disadvantage of using audio features to predict popularity. The notes identify the problem: algorithms based on audio features may misidentify a song's main features when its acoustic traits vary, while fixed descriptive tags are more reliable.

steps.title: Test the focus on disadvantage
steps.content: A only says many algorithms use audio features; it does not explain a weakness. C contrasts audio features and tags but does not clearly state why audio-feature prediction is less reliable. D explains why tags work well, not why audio features can fail. The remaining choice states the misidentification problem and connects it to lower reliability. The answer is B.
